name: Roadside Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the half-and-half, margarine, and salt in a saucepan until the margarine melts.
2. Spread the hash browns evenly in a 9x13-inch pan.
3. Pour the heated mixture over the potatoes.
4. Sprinkle the parmesan cheese on top.
5. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
